no: BG1 murder mystery quest inspired by Agatha Christie. An assassination mystery on Dukes' Retreat Isle where guests are killed one by one. Messenger appears in AR0800. Features companion interjections from Safana, Skie, Ajantis, Jaheira and others. Custom music and new area maps. EET-native.
sum: Murder mystery quest on Dukes’ Retreat Isle inspired by Agatha Christie. Guests are killed one by one — find the culprit. Custom music, new areas, companion interjections.

co.no: Adds Dukes' Retreat Isle murder mystery. Messenger spawns in AR0800, ship from AR1200. Custom areas, music, multiple NPC creatures, companion interjections from Safana, Skie, Ajantis, Jaheira and others.
